title: The Light (A Juice Wrld Cover)
lyrics: Forever's a long, long time from tonight When it's dark outside, you're always alive, yeah This heart of mine was once cold as the ice The more I try, the more I open my mind For you to find a key that's hiding deep inside I owe fines, the devil say I owe him for life But I can feel it like I got it on my side Remember when he sent you to me that night? Had to cuff you up like a cop on a hike Cupid is the judge so I must testify I won't move or budge, I'll stand by you for life All my life, when you die is when I die I sometimes wonder why We argue and fight and quickly make things rise Probably cause we gotta grow more over time Wouldn't be real love without rough nights Can't feel these drugs but I feel your eyes When you look at my things feel alright When it's dark outside, you're always alive, yeah This heart of mine was once cold as the ice The more I try, the more I open my mind For you to find a key that's hiding deep inside Into it, don't dig into it Don't want to hurt your heart or break my soul I won't do it Also baby you're my lifeline, you're an influence All the times you was mad, I was under all the influence Drugs for the people that don't get it It's really rare to see the real love chillin' Some people do get hurt and never love again Some people get hurt and give the drugs again Some people get drugs and go and hit the quantum man Love is a one night stand where you can play pretend And me, I'm in it I love these hoes, one thing, that's pretentious And if I know one thing, then I know this It's better forever, worse or better, don't discuss it That's how I'm coming When it's dark outside, you're always alive, yeah This heart of mine was once cold as the ice The more I try, the more I open my mind For you to find a key that's hiding deep inside It's hiding deep inside Thanks for watching!

lyricsSegments.text: Forever's a long, long time from tonight
When it's dark outside, you're always alive, yeah
This heart of mine was once cold as the ice
The more I try, the more I open my mind
For you to find a key that's hiding deep inside
I owe fines, the devil say I owe him for life
But I can feel it like I got it on my side
Remember when he sent you to me that night?
Had to cuff you up like a cop on a hike
Cupid is the judge so I must testify
I won't move or budge, I'll stand by you for life
All my life, when you die is when I die
I sometimes wonder why
We argue and fight and quickly make things rise
Probably cause we gotta grow more over time
Wouldn't be real love without rough nights
Can't feel these drugs but I feel your eyes
When you look at my things feel alright
When it's dark outside, you're always alive, yeah
This heart of mine was once cold as the ice
The more I try, the more I open my mind
For you to find a key that's hiding deep inside
Into it, don't dig into it
Don't want to hurt your heart or break my soul
I won't do it
Also baby you're my lifeline, you're an influence
All the times you was mad, I was under all the influence
Drugs for the people that don't get it
It's really rare to see the real love chillin'
Some people do get hurt and never love again
Some people get hurt and give the drugs again
Some people get drugs and go and hit the quantum man
Love is a one night stand where you can play pretend
And me, I'm in it
I love these hoes, one thing, that's pretentious
And if I know one thing, then I know this
It's better forever, worse or better, don't discuss it
That's how I'm coming
When it's dark outside, you're always alive, yeah
This heart of mine was once cold as the ice
The more I try, the more I open my mind
For you to find a key that's hiding deep inside
It's hiding deep inside
Thanks for watching!
